commit.message:
Rework cash flow overlays: single-payment generation, overlay-driven balance projection

- Generate endpoint: create ONE upcoming CC payment per card using most-recent
  statement close-date balance (if today > close_day → this month's close, else
  prior month's close); same logic for loans (next upcoming due date only).
  Duplicate guard now keys on (source, description, flow_date) not YYYY-MM.

- get_daily_balances: remove auto CC/loan projection blocks entirely; replace
  with overlay-driven projections — active CashFlowOverlay rows with a future
  flow_date are applied as a step-change forward on the linked account's balance
  array, so the chart reflects exactly what the user has decided to keep.

- Frontend: remove is_recurring / recurrence_day from overlay form state,
  BLANK_FORM, openEditOverlay, saveOverlay body, form UI, table header, and
  table rows.  Update summary-row colSpan accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ci: replace actions/cache with Swatinem/rust-cache for Rust caching (#45)

Swatinem/rust-cache automatically handles incremental artifact exclusion,
stale cache pruning, and workspace-aware caching without manual path/key
configuration. Pinned to commit SHA for supply chain safety.

feat(phase5+6): RGPD OAuth, système monétisation complet (Pièces/Globos/Stripe)

Phase 5 — RGPD & Sécurité OAuth :
- profileComplete flag sur User (false pour nouveaux comptes OAuth)
- OAuthCallback.js + CompleteProfile.js — flux post-OAuth avec complétion obligatoire
- PrivateRoute redirige vers /complete-profile si profil incomplet
- ConsentModal RGPD + page Legal (CGU / Confidentialité / Mentions légales)
- Watermark anti-capture vidéo en live

Phase 6 — Monétisation :
- Deux monnaies : Pièces (viewers achètent) + Globos (streamers reçoivent)
- Wallet sur User (coins, globos) + MongoDB $inc atomique
- GiftCatalog model (soft delete isActive) + seedGifts.js (6 cadeaux initiaux)
- Transaction model — audit log complet toutes opérations monétaires
- Routes : giftCatalog.js, wallet.js, payments.js (Stripe Checkout + webhook)
- coinPacks.js — config 4 packs pièces
- WalletPage.js — 4 onglets (Acheter / Convertir / Retirer / Historique)
- ModerationPanel — onglet Cadeaux CRUD (admin niveau ≥2)
- LiveStream — catalog dynamique depuis DB, déduction pièces via socket async
- i18n 5 langues — sections wallet, gifts, payments

Docs & tracking :
- README.md v5.0 — structure complète, 22 pages, Phase 5+6 features
- MEMORY.md — Gemini retiré, Claude-only, décisions Phase 5+6
- MVP.md / POST_MVP.md / ROADMAP / ROADMAP_COMPLETE mis à jour
- Administratif/env_variables_checklist.md — audit 28 vars .env
- backend/.env.example — 8 nouvelles variables (Stripe + Cloudinary)

Fix payment race conditions, missing receipts, and audit log gaps

- Make createTransactionAndSendReceipt idempotent to prevent duplicate
  transactions when webhook and verify endpoint race
- Add webhook signature verification (HMAC-SHA512) for Lenco webhooks
- Fix confirmSubscriptionPayment: no longer overwrites paymentReference,
  returns success for already-active subscriptions instead of erroring
- Backfill missing receiptNumber on subscriptions when Transaction exists
- Wire paymentSource filter to getTransactions backend query
- Add repairPayments.js script to backfill missing transactions/receipts
- Export transactions Excel route was missing from router

- Add `FirstRunSetup` capability (second-run interactive synthesis wizard, Silent path for tests)
- Add `TIER_CALIBRATION` exported const + `FirstRunComplete`/`UserCustomized`/`PreferredAgent` to FAIConfig
- Add first-run silent auto-configure in commands/index.ts (8-step priority cascade from detect cache)
- Move second-run [Enter]/[S] prompt to just before bench.Open() — after brand header, not before

commit.message:
Rediriger vers les résultats de recherche après inscription

Quand un utilisateur non inscrit lance une recherche, ses paramètres sont
sauvegardés dans le contexte (pendingSearch) avant la redirection vers
l'écran d'inscription. Après inscription/connexion, il est automatiquement
redirigé vers la page de résultats sans avoir à refaire sa recherche.

fix(install): 修复 brew 安装时 shell wrapper 配置失败

- 移除对 command siti init zsh 的依赖
  post_install 在 brew 安装过程中运行时，siti 二进制的实际路径是 cellar 临时目录，
  不是最终的 /opt/homebrew/bin，导致 detect_installation_type 识别失败
- 改用直接内联 write_wrapper() 函数写入 wrapper 内容
  绕过路径识别问题，直接将 wrapper 代码写入 zshrc/bashrc
- 保证 brew 安装流程中 shell wrapper 配置一定能成功写入

Add Milsnabb competition type with full profile page integration and dashboard performance fixes

Implements the complete Milsnabb discipline: DB table, tiebreaker, medals, start list generator,
controller dispatch, results view, competition wizard, and series calculation. Integrates Milsnabb
into the profile page (all 4 tabs: Tävlingar, Resultat, Dashboard, Profil) with discipline-specific
shooter class, handicap calculation, series counts, and medal stats. Adds discipline dropdown to
club member mini dashboard. Optimizes dashboard loading by eliminating N+1 content service queries
(batch loading competition names), skipping UnifiedResultsService for non-Precision disciplines,
and batching medal stats across all years in a single pass.

commit.message:
feat(admin): expose admin account lifecycle and session controls in dashboard (#139)

## Summary

- Add **Account** tab to admin dashboard with admin list/create/delete
management
- Add **password change** form for self-service password rotation
- Add **logout** button to dashboard header with confirmation dialog
- Self-delete protection preserved: API returns SELF_DELETE error, UI
shows translated message
- All new UI strings are **bilingual** (Danish + English)
- 17 component tests across AdminAccount and AdminDashboard

## Test plan

- [x] All existing tests pass (82 shared + 280 API + 85 web)
- [x] Lint clean
- [x] Build succeeds
- [x] New AdminAccount tests: list, create (success + conflict), delete
(success + self-delete + cancel), change password (success + short
password + wrong password)
- [x] New AdminDashboard tests: tab rendering, tab switching, logout
(success + cancel + network error)

Closes #135

commit.message:
Switch to parabolic (quadratic) regression for price vs occupancy

- Fits y = ax² + bx + c using least squares normal equations
- R² improved from 0.33 to 0.73
- Shows vertex point (trough/sweet spot) on chart with star marker
- Correctly labels upward vs downward parabola interpretation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add programs cinematic carousel and MPA refactor

Programs section: replace pinned horizontal track with a scrub-linked
centered-card carousel. Heading + subtitle fade out as user scrolls;
cards reveal centered in viewport; each card dwells at center before
advancing; last card holds longer to signal completion. Per-card scale
spotlight (sine.inOut easing) eliminates the snap feel between pauses.

Bug fix: use offsetWidth (layout) not getBoundingClientRect().width
(visual/transformed) for card step calculations — prevents the last
card from undershooting its centered position.

MPA structure: HTML pages moved to src/pages/ with per-page TS entry
points; vite.config updated for new input map. Turbo Drive added for
client-side navigation with GSAP cleanup hooks on turbo:before-render.

Consent banner: OJJConsentBanner component + animationsAllowed() helper
gate motion to user opt-in; data-reduce-motion on <html> controls GSAP.

Also: hide scrollbar globally (Firefox + WebKit).

commit.message:
fix: use name-based deprecation instead of dimensions, preserve name on upgrade (#86)

- Revert dimensions-based auto-deprecation in PUT /workflows/deploy (dangerous:
  multiple workflows share the same dimensions by design)
- Add optional `name` field to DeployWorkflowItemSchema — when provided, the
  deploy uses it as stable identity and deprecates any existing active workflow
  with that name. When omitted, auto-generates as before (no deprecation).
- Fix startup-validator upgrader to reuse the old workflow's name instead of
  generating a new one, so clients calling by-name are not disrupted after
  auto-upgrades. Deprecates old first (frees unique index), then inserts
  replacement with same name.

commit.message:
feat(auth): flow complet 'Mot de passe oublié' — backend + frontend

Backend:
- models.py : colonnes password_reset_token + password_reset_expires sur User
- database.py : migration 009_password_reset (ALTER TABLE if missing)
- brevo_service.py : send_password_reset_email() — email HTML Wezea (lien valide 1h)
- auth_router.py : POST /auth/forgot-password (génère token, envoie email)
  + POST /auth/reset-password (valide token, met à jour le mot de passe)
  → anti-énumération : forgot-password retourne 200 même si l'email est inconnu
  → token à usage unique (effacé après utilisation)
  → comptes Google exclus (pas de mot de passe local)
  → comparaison timezone-safe (SQLite retourne des datetimes naïfs)

Frontend:
- App.tsx : détection ?reset_token=xxx dans l'URL → ouvre LoginPage en mode reset
- LoginPage.tsx : 4 sous-vues animées (AnimatePresence)
  forgot → formulaire email
  forgot-sent → confirmation email envoyé
  reset → formulaire nouveau mot de passe + confirmation
  reset-done → succès + bouton Se connecter
  + Lien "Mot de passe oublié ?" en bas du formulaire login

Tests (73 passent) :
- conftest.py : fixture db_user (création directe en DB, évite le rate limit /register)
  + mock send_password_reset_email dans _patch_brevo
- test_auth.py : 8 nouveaux tests (forgot 4 + reset 4)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add withdrawal stress test and borrow rate risk analyzer

P0-B: stress_test_vault — simulates large MetaVault redemptions with a
liquidity waterfall (idle capital → maturing positions → LP removal → PT sale).
Computes coverage, cost to remaining depositors, and max safe redemption size.
Supports market stress mode (2x impact). ERC-7540 has no cancelRequest — once
redemption is requested, the vault MUST fulfill it.

P1-B: Borrow rate risk section added to get_looping_strategy — fetches 30-day
historical borrow rates, computes mean/stddev, and for each loop level estimates
the probability of going underwater using a normal CDF approximation. Includes
95th percentile safety flag. Best-effort: silently skips if history unavailable.

New files:
- src/tools/stress_test.ts — stress_test_vault MCP tool
- src/types.ts — StressTestResult, WithdrawalWaterfallTier, BorrowRateRisk, BorrowRateAnalysis
- src/tools/looping.ts — borrow rate risk section with normalCDF helper
- src/index.ts — stress test tool registration
